news.title:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys resumed operations at Kalinganagar plant, Odisha, activating two furnaces on 11 March 2026.
Two additional furnaces to be activated soon; further updates from the company are expected.
news.summary:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys resumed operations at Kalinganagar plant, Odisha, activating two furnaces on 11 March 2026.
Two additional furnaces to be activated soon; further updates from the company are expected.

news.title:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd completed acquiring Tata Steel's Ferro Chrome plant in Odisha.
The acquisition cost Rs 610 crore plus GST, with strategic benefits from proximity to captive mines and projects.
news.summary:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd completed acquiring Tata Steel's Ferro Chrome plant in Odisha.
The acquisition cost Rs 610 crore plus GST, with strategic benefits from proximity to captive mines and projects.

news.title:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd's Q3 FY26 EBITDA, PAT rose on higher ferrochrome prices.
Company to acquire Tata Steel's Kalinganagar plant for ₹610 Cr; expansion on track for 2026.
news.summary:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd's Q3 FY26 EBITDA, PAT rose on higher ferrochrome prices.

news.title:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys Ltd shared its Q3 FY2026 earnings call recording.
The recording, as per SEBI regulations, is accessible on the company's website.

news.title:
IMFA plans to boost ferro chrome production to 500,000 tonnes by FY28.
This expansion involves a capital outlay of Rs.1,610 crore.
news.summary:
IMFA plans to boost ferro chrome production to 500,000 tonnes by FY28.

news.title:
IMFA reports Q3 net profit up 41% to ₹131.3 crore, revenue up 9.3% to ₹703 crore.
EBITDA grows 28.4% to ₹164.6 crore, margin improves to 23.4% from 19.9% YoY.
news.summary:
IMFA reports Q3 net profit up 41% to ₹131.3 crore, revenue up 9.3% to ₹703 crore.
EBITDA grows 28.4% to ₹164.6 crore, margin improves to 23.4% from 19.9% YoY.

news.title:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys reported Q3 net profit of ₹1.31B, up from ₹933M YoY.
The company demonstrated strong year-on-year profit growth for the quarter.
news.summary:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys reported Q3 net profit of ₹1.31B, up from ₹933M YoY.

news.title:
IMFA will hold a Board Meeting on 5th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan to 7th Feb 2026 as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
IMFA will hold a Board Meeting on 5th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY25 results.

news.title:
Indian Metal and Ferro Alloys Ltd. (IMFA) shares fell 12% on Jan 6, the largest drop since last year.
Concerns over South African ferrochrome smelters restarting and falling domestic ferrochrome prices impact IMFA.
news.summary:
Indian Metal and Ferro Alloys Ltd. (IMFA) shares fell 12% on Jan 6, the largest drop since last year.
Concerns over South African ferrochrome smelters restarting and falling domestic ferrochrome prices impact IMFA.

The milestone highlights sustained growth, market upgrades, and gains across multiple timeframes.

news.title:
ICRA upgraded Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys' long-term rating to ICRA AA (Stable).
Short-term rating remains at ICRA A1, reflecting the company's improved credit profile.

HZL surges driven by a rally in silver prices, enhancing market performance.

Despite today's slight decline, it shows strong growth and long-term gains.

news.title:
Indian Metals & Ferro Alloys signs deal to acquire Tata Steel's ferrochrome plant for ₹610 Cr, adding 1.5L tons capacity.
The facility's location near mines ensures cost synergies. Q2 FY26 net profit at ₹98.8 Cr; rising prices may boost Q3.
news.summary:
